name: io.github.getubik/ubik
description: Psssst! — an AI resident engineer for your codebase. Audits the repository (researcher LLM defaults to GLM-5.1 via Z.AI, also speaks Anthropic / OpenAI / Kimi / MiniMax / Ollama), surfaces stale code, missing tests, inconsistent patterns and security smells into a structured markdown report, and keeps a searchable notebook of past findings. Pair the MCP surface with the autonomous daemon (`ubik run`) to also get Telegram-approved fixes shipped through Aider or the Claude Agent SDK.
